composition.tagline: Your voice, your details — always in your hands.
composition.cta: Shape how ivangel sounds and keep your church details current.
composition.title: Style guide & settings

beats.caption: Where ivangel learns your voice
beats.narration: Everything eye-vanjel writes sounds like your church — and that comes from your settings. Let's look at where you shape your voice and keep your details up to date.

beats.label: Settings · Church Information
beats.caption: Your church details
beats.narration: Church Information holds the details that shape every generation — your name, your location, your vision and how people reach you. Keep these current and your content stays accurate.

beats.label: Settings · Refresh website
beats.caption: Re-read your website
beats.narration: Changed something on your website? Tap Refresh, and eye-vanjel re-reads your site and folds the latest into your voice profile — no copying and pasting required.

beats.label: Settings · Style Guide
beats.caption: Edit your voice profile
beats.narration: This is your style guide — the voice profile eye-vanjel writes from. Read it, tweak a word or a whole section, save, and every new piece picks up the change. You can download a copy anytime.

beats.caption: Sound like you, every time
beats.narration: That's settings — keep your details fresh and your voice your own, and eye-vanjel does the rest.
